name: io.github.forgesworn/rendezvous-mcp
description: Fair meeting point discovery for AI agents. Uses real travel-time isochrones (not naive midpoints) to find venues equally accessible to all participants. 5 tools: isochrone computation, venue search, fairness scoring, turn-by-turn directions, and L402 credential storage for paid routing engines.

environmentVariables.name: VALHALLA_URL
environmentVariables.description: Valhalla routing engine URL. Defaults to a public endpoint.

environmentVariables.name: OVERPASS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Overpass API URL for venue search. Defaults to public endpoints.
